instruction: In TextEdit, set the front document body to {PHRASE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads document text; baseline placeholder so the no-op scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to activate' -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to if (count of documents) = 0 then make new document' -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to set text of front document to "{BASELINE}"' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to set text of front document to "{PHRASE}"' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "TextEdit" to get text of front document
